subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Best-Beloved of the world and the Goal of all nations, Who hath guided His chosen ones to the Most Exalted Horizon and from the choice wine of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوب عالم و مقصود امم را که اولیا را بافق اعلی راه نمود و از رحیق بیان
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution
